messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Create a small library with one function and a unit test.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Create a small library with one function and a unit test.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "define-function-spec",
      "title": "Define function and API",
      "description": "Decide the single function's purpose, name, inputs, outputs, edge cases, and expected behavior; document examples and error handling rules.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A short specification document exists describing function signature, behavior, example inputs/outputs, and edge cases."
    },
    {
      "id": "initialize-project-structure",
      "title": "Initialize project structure",
      "description": "Create repository layout with src and tests folders, initialize package manager/config files, and add basic linter/test framework configuration.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-function-spec"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository contains src/, tests/, package config (e.g., package.json or pyproject.toml), and test framework configured."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-function",
      "title": "Implement the function",
      "description": "Write the function code in the src folder according to the spec, include basic input validation and inline comments, and ensure it follows project style rules.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "initialize-project-structure",
        "define-function-spec"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Function source file exists, adheres to the spec, and passes static checks/linters where applicable."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-test",
      "title": "Write unit test for function",
      "description": "Create a unit test file that imports the function and includes tests for normal cases, edge cases, and error conditions using the chosen test framework.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-function"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "One or more unit tests exist that exercise the function's expected behavior and edge cases."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-tests-and-fix",
      "title": "Run tests and fix issues",
      "description": "Execute the test suite, diagnose failing tests or uncovered bugs, update implementation or tests as needed until all tests pass reliably.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "write-unit-test"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All unit tests pass locally (green test run) and no regressions are introduced."
    },
    {
      "id": "finalize-and-document",
      "title": "Finalize and document library",
      "description": "Add README with usage examples, update package metadata/version, include instructions to run tests, and optionally add CI configuration for test automation.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "run-tests-and-fix"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README and metadata are present with usage example and test instructions; CI config included if applicable."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Phase-based functional decomposition: first define the function, set up the project skeleton, implement the code, write tests, run and fix tests, then finalize documentation and packaging."
}
